channel.title: Yandex N.V. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Yandex N.V. (yandex).

item.title: CVE-2025-5469 · 7.3 HIGH — Dylib Hijacking in Yandex Messenger
item.description: Uncontrolled Search Path Element vulnerability in Yandex Messenger on MacOS allows Search Order Hijacking.This issue affects Telemost: before 2.245

item.title: CVE-2025-5471 · 7.3 HIGH — Dylib Hijacking in Yandex Telemost
item.description: Uncontrolled Search Path Element vulnerability in Yandex Telemost on MacOS allows Search Order Hijacking.This issue affects Telemost: before 2.19.1.

item.title: CVE-2025-5470 · 7.3 HIGH — Dylib Hijacking in Yandex Disk
item.description: Uncontrolled Search Path Element vulnerability in Yandex Disk on MacOS allows Search Order Hijacking.This issue affects Disk: before 3.2.45.3275.

item.title: CVE-2024-12168 · 8.4 HIGH — DLL Hijacking in Yandex Telemost
item.description: Yandex Telemost for Desktop before 2.7.0 has a DLL Hijacking Vulnerability because an untrusted search path is used.

item.title: CVE-2023-26226 · 7.4 HIGH 🌩️ — A use after free memory corruption issue exists in Yandex Browser for Desktop prior to version 24.4.0.682
item.description: A use after free memory corruption issue exists in Yandex Browser for Desktop prior to version 24.4.0.682

item.title: CVE-2019-16536 · 8.2 HIGH — Stack overflow leading to DoS can be triggered by a malicious authenticated client.
item.description: Stack overflow leading to DoS can be triggered by a malicious authenticated client in Clickhouse before 19.14.3.3.

item.title: CVE-2021-25262 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Yandex Browser for Android prior to version 21.3.0 allows remote attackers to perform IDN homograph attack.
item.description: Yandex Browser for Android prior to version 21.3.0 allows remote attackers to perform IDN homograph attack.

item.title: CVE-2021-25255 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Yandex Browser Lite for Android prior to version 21.1.0 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service.
item.description: Yandex Browser Lite for Android prior to version 21.1.0 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2021-25254 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Yandex Browser Lite for Android before 21.1.0 allows remote attackers to spoof the address bar.
item.description: Yandex Browser Lite for Android before 21.1.0 allows remote attackers to spoof the address bar.

item.title: CVE-2024-6473 · 8.4 HIGH — DLL Hijacking in Yandex Browser
item.description: Yandex Browser for Desktop before 24.7.1.380 has a DLL Hijacking Vulnerability because an untrusted search path is used.

item.title: CVE-2022-28229 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: The hash functionality in userver before 42059b6319661583b3080cab9b595d4f8ac48128 allows attackers to cause a denial of service via crafted HTTP request, involving collisions.

item.title: CVE-2022-28228 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Out-of-bounds read was discovered in YDB server. An attacker could construct a query with insert statement that would allow him to read sensitive information from other memory locations or cause a crash.

item.title: CVE-2022-28225
item.description: Local privilege vulnerability in Yandex Browser for Windows prior to 22.3.3.684 allows a local, low privileged, attacker to execute arbitary code with the SYSTEM privileges through manipulating symlinks to installation file during Yandex Browser upda…

item.title: CVE-2022-28226
item.description: Local privilege vulnerability in Yandex Browser for Windows prior to 22.3.3.801 allows a local, low privileged, attacker to execute arbitary code with the SYSTEM privileges through manipulating temporary files in directory with insecure permissions d…

item.title: CVE-2021-25261
item.description: Local privilege vulnerability in Yandex Browser for Windows prior to 22.5.0.862 allows a local, low privileged, attacker to execute arbitary code with the SYSTEM privileges through manipulating symlinks to installation file during Yandex Browser upda…

item.title: CVE-2020-27970
item.description: Yandex Browser before 20.10.0 allows remote attackers to spoof the address bar

item.title: CVE-2020-27969
item.description: Yandex Browser for Android 20.8.4 allows remote attackers to perform SOP bypass and addresss bar spoofing

item.title: CVE-2021-25263
item.description: Local privilege vulnerability in Yandex Browser for Windows prior to 21.9.0.390 allows a local, low privileged, attacker to execute arbitary code with the SYSTEM privileges through manipulating files in directory with insecure permissions during Yand…

item.title: CVE-2019-15024
item.description: In all versions of ClickHouse before 19.14.3, an attacker having write access to ZooKeeper and who is able to run a custom server available from the network where ClickHouse runs, can create a custom-built malicious server that will act as a ClickHou…

item.title: CVE-2019-16535
item.description: In all versions of ClickHouse before 19.14, an OOB read, OOB write and integer underflow in decompression algorithms can be used to achieve RCE or DoS via native protocol.

item.title: CVE-2018-14672
item.description: In ClickHouse before 18.12.13, functions for loading CatBoost models allowed path traversal and reading arbitrary files through error messages.

item.title: CVE-2018-14671
item.description: In ClickHouse before 18.10.3, unixODBC allowed loading arbitrary shared objects from the file system which led to a Remote Code Execution vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2018-14669
item.description: ClickHouse MySQL client before versions 1.1.54390 had "LOAD DATA LOCAL INFILE" functionality enabled that allowed a malicious MySQL database read arbitrary files from the connected ClickHouse server.

item.title: CVE-2018-14668
item.description: In ClickHouse before 1.1.54388, "remote" table function allowed arbitrary symbols in "user", "password" and "default_database" fields which led to Cross Protocol Request Forgery Attacks.

item.title: CVE-2018-14670
item.description: Incorrect configuration in deb package in ClickHouse before 1.1.54131 could lead to unauthorized use of the database.

item.title: CVE-2017-7327
item.description: Yandex Browser installer for Desktop before 17.4.1 has a DLL Hijacking Vulnerability because an untrusted search path is used for dnsapi.dll, winmm.dll, ntmarta.dll, cryptbase.dll or profapi.dll.

item.title: CVE-2017-7326
item.description: Race condition issue in Yandex Browser for Android before 17.4.0.16 allowed a remote attacker to potentially exploit memory corruption via a crafted HTML page

item.title: CVE-2017-7325
item.description: Yandex Browser before 16.9.0 allows remote attackers to spoof the address bar via window.open.

item.title: CVE-2016-8508
item.description: Yandex Browser for desktop before 17.1.1.227 does not show Protect (similar to Safebrowsing in Chromium) warnings in web-sites with special content-type, which could be used by remote attacker for prevention Protect warning on own malicious web-site.

item.title: CVE-2016-8507
item.description: Yandex Browser for iOS before 16.10.0.2357 does not properly restrict processing of facetime:// URLs, which allows remote attackers to initiate facetime-call without user's approval and obtain video and audio data from a device via a crafted web site…

item.title: CVE-2016-8506
item.description: XSS in Yandex Browser Translator in Yandex browser for desktop for versions from 15.12 to 16.2 could be used by remote attacker for evaluation arbitrary javascript code.

item.title: CVE-2016-8505
item.description: XSS in Yandex Browser BookReader in Yandex browser for desktop for versions before 16.6. could be used by remote attacker for evaluation arbitrary javascript code.

item.title: CVE-2016-8504
item.description: CSRF of synchronization form in Yandex Browser for desktop before version 16.6 could be used by remote attacker to steal saved data in browser profile.

item.title: CVE-2016-8503
item.description: Yandex Protect Anti-phishing warning in Yandex Browser for desktop from version 16.7 to 16.9 could be used by remote attacker for brute-forcing passwords from important web-resource with special JavaScript.

item.title: CVE-2016-8502
item.description: Yandex Protect Anti-phishing warning in Yandex Browser for desktop from version 15.12.0 to 16.2 could be used by remote attacker for brute-forcing passwords from important web-resource with special JavaScript.

item.title: CVE-2016-8501
item.description: Security WiFi bypass in Yandex Browser from version 15.10 to 15.12 allows remote attacker to sniff traffic in open or WEP-protected wi-fi networks despite of special security mechanism is enabled.
